&<color_light_green> @User > skill -RECALIBRATE -help
</color> skill: RECALIBRATE
   Available if бҙҙбөҒбҙ№бҙ¬бҙә is not attuned to their own reality.
   Blood is required for temporary reality stabilization.
   The user will return to their reality, then be extracted by AltarOS remote after the estimated time has elapsed.
   The user will return to the home away from home.
   Repeated visits will reattune the user to their own reality.
   WARNING: Dimensional instability will make бҙҙбөҒбҙ№бҙ¬бҙә communication impossible.
